name: Decrease LP Liquidity
description: Remove liquidity from a Uniswap V3 LP position
detail: Removes the specified amount of liquidity from an existing position. Set liquidity to MAX to remove all liquidity. Important: this does NOT transfer tokens — you must call collect-fees afterward to actually receive the freed tokens. The position NFT remains and can be reused.

liquidity.description: Amount of liquidity to remove (use MAX to remove all)

examples.input: Remove all liquidity from my Uniswap V3 position #12345
